comment: Eval fixtures. Synthesized entries are generated on demand by run-eval.sh with `say` (deterministic voice+rate). Add real recordings by dropping a wav in audio/ and an entry here with "synth": null. `text` is what gets spoken; optional `ref` overrides the scoring reference when the model's inverse text normalization writes it differently (numbers, currency, dates).

fixtures.text: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
please schedule a meeting for tomorrow at three in the afternoon and invite the whole design team
hey just following up on the invoice from last week let me know if you need anything else from me
the total comes to four hundred and twenty seven dollars and sixty two cents due on march third
fixtures.ref: the total comes to $427.62 due on march 3

fixtures.text: restart the server then check the logs for any authentication errors before deploying again
sometimes people talk quite quickly when they are excited about an idea and the app should keep up
and other times people speak rather slowly with long pauses between their thoughts
wait really are you sure that happened yesterday i thought it was next friday

the meeting covered three main topics first the quarterly budget review which ran long as usual second the new hiring plan for the engineering team and third a discussion about moving the office to a bigger space downtown sometime next spring
